---
title: "Simulation Studies"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Simulation Studies}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  eval = FALSE
)
```

## Overview

This vignette replicates the simulation studies from the thesis, comparing the
MFM-SBM algorithm against the Louvain method for community detection.

## MFM-SBM vs Louvain

```{r}
library(mfmsbm)

n <- 100
K <- 2
p <- 0.5
q <- 0.1
M <- 600
BI <- 300
N <- 20
gamma_ <- a <- b <- 1
lambda <- 1
K_start <- 9

K_mfm <- K_louv <- RI_mfm <- RI_louv <- rep(NA, N)

for (i in seq_len(N)) {
  data_gen <- generate_sbm(n, K, p, q, "balanced")
  A <- data_gen$A0
  Z0 <- data_gen$z0

  # MFM-SBM
  z_start <- c(sample(1:K_start, K_start), sample(1:K_start, n - K_start, replace = TRUE))
  logVn <- log_vn_miller(gamma_, n, n + 10, lambda)
  fit <- cogibbs_poisson(M, K_start, A, n, a, b, gamma_, logVn, z_start)
  K_mfm[i] <- find_mode(fit$num_k[-seq_len(BI)])

  cc <- coclustering_matrix(fit$z_post[, (BI + 1):M])
  if (requireNamespace("mcclust.ext", quietly = TRUE) &&
      requireNamespace("fossil", quietly = TRUE)) {
    memb <- mcclust.ext::minVI(cc, method = "avg", max.k = 20)$cl
    RI_mfm[i] <- fossil::compare(memb, Z0, method = "rand")
  }

  # Louvain
  if (requireNamespace("igraph", quietly = TRUE)) {
    net <- igraph::graph_from_adjacency_matrix(A, mode = "undirected")
    louv <- igraph::cluster_louvain(net)$membership
    K_louv[i] <- length(unique(louv))
    if (requireNamespace("fossil", quietly = TRUE)) {
      RI_louv[i] <- fossil::compare(louv, Z0, method = "rand")
    }
  }
}
```

## Results

```{r}
cat("MFM-SBM - Mean K_hat:", mean(K_mfm, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Mean RI:", mean(RI_mfm, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Louvain - Mean K_hat:", mean(K_louv, na.rm = TRUE),
    "Mean RI:", mean(RI_louv, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```
